IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (16186411.pdf)
SUMMARY: Experienced professional with a background in database programming and analysis, specializing in .NET development. Proficient in various technologies including ASP.NET, Entity Framework, LINQ, and SQL Server. Skilled in web application development, security features, and agile methodologies.
SKILLS: .NET Framework (4.0/4.5), ASP.NET, ASP.NET MVC, VB.NET, ADO.NET, Entity Framework, AJAX, Web Services, LINQ, C#, JavaScript, jQuery, CK Editor, Class Libraries, Active Directory, SQL Server (Database Management), Visual Studio, Eclipse, NetBeans, Dreamweaver, Tortoise SVN, GitHub, Microsoft Word, Excel, Access, PowerPoint
